shapes.text: Let’s Co-Create a Great Experience:✅ Be Present – avoid multitasking✅ Respect All Ideas✅ Use the Chat – We love questions✅ Collaborate Openly in Breakouts✅ Keep Your Mic on Mute When Not Speaking

texts.name: TextBox 4
texts.text:
Let’s Co-Create a Great Experience:
✅ Be Present – avoid multitasking
✅ Respect All Ideas
✅ Use the Chat – We love questions
✅ Collaborate Openly in Breakouts
✅ Keep Your Mic on Mute When Not Speaking

texts.name: TextBox 18
texts.text:
👥 Group Task:
Use the empathy map framework to explore user insights
📍 Breakout Room Topic: Redesigning the onboarding experience
🧩 Download template from www.reallygreatsite.com/tools
📷 Add sticky notes for:
Says
Thinks
Does
Feels
🎤 5-minute group share after breakout!
